---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for VibeLearn
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Before Submitting

- [ ] I searched [existing issues](https://github.com/anergcorp/vibelearn/issues) and confirmed this is not a duplicate

---

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this feature solve? What use case does it enable?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to see. Be as specific as you can.

## Which part of VibeLearn does this affect?

- [ ] Analysis pipeline (stack detection, concept extraction, quiz generation)
- [ ] `vl` CLI (quiz, status, gaps, login)
- [ ] Claude Code hooks (observation capture, session lifecycle)
- [ ] Cursor integration
- [ ] Upstream sync / vibelearn.dev
- [ ] Configuration / settings
- [ ] Other: ___

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've thought about?

## Additional Context

Screenshots, examples, or links that help explain the request.
